title: 3pk Plastic Scrubbing Brush Floor Cleaning Hand Tools With Stiff Nylon Bristles Mould, Limescale and Grout Remover Ergonomic and Heavy Duty Cleaning Products For Home and Commercial Use
features: EFFECTIVE FLOOR CLEANER - The Dustpan and Brush Store 3pk scrubbing brush set comes with stiff nylon bristles that allows you to effectively remove sticky, hard to deal with mould, limescale and grout from floor tiles. The bristles of our cleaning brush are tough and durable, allowing them to stay firm, and do its job, even after weeks of heavy daily use.

USE ANYWHERE - Our 3pk scrubber set is not just limited to being a floor brush. With its tough bristles, you can use it as a pool brush - allowing you to get rid of algae from pool walls, a kitchen sink cleaner - to get rid of grease and grime, bathroom brush - keeping those spaces between floor tiles clean, tub scrubber - to keep your bathtub free from soap build-up, and can even be used as a radiator cleaner to get rid of dried up motor oil.

ERGONOMIC GRIP DESIGN - Using a manual tile cleaner brush is hard work. And that is why we specifically made the handle of our tile scrubber brush as ergonomic as possible. The handle is ergonomically shaped, allowing for a much better grip, while making it much easier, and more comfortable to use.

PRACTICAL GIFT IDEA - Wouldn't it be better to give a gift that actually gets used? Our scrubbing brush set is a proven limescale remover, grout cleaner and mould remover that makes for a practical housewarming present - allowing your friends and family to keep their bathroom and kitchen limescale, mould and grout free!
SCRUBBING BRUSH BY THE DUSTPAN AND BRUSH STORE - Designed with the end user in mind - A UK Company with Customer Satisfaction in Mind
description: Product Description TDBS Scrubbing Brushes - Pack of 3 Designed to break through tough dirt, soap scum, grease, and outdoor grime. The stiff bristles maintain their shape even under heavy pressure, making them ideal for tiles, grout, patio slabs, and garage floors. Check our Dish Brush Product Line! Great for anyone looking for versatile scrubbing brushes for cleaning floors, patios, bathrooms, and more. Previous page Scrub Anywhere Multi-Purpose A reliable nylon brush set suitable for home or professional use. Heavy Duty Stiff Bristles The bristles maintain shape and strength during strong scrubbing. Supports Brushing Ergonomic Handle Iron-style handle provides a firm, non-slip grip, making it easier to apply pressure when scrubbing Build for Tough Use Durable Plastic Crafted from thick, impact-resistant plastic, these scrubbing brushes for cleaning tough surfaces. Next page 1 Multi-Purpose 2 Stiff Bristles 3 Ergonomic Handle 4 Durable Plastic Versatile Scrubbing Brushes For Kitchen, Bathroom, Tiles , Skirting Boards etc Experience powerful cleaning with this Iron Scrubbing Brush – Pack of 3, designed for deep cleaning on multiple surfaces around the home. Each brush features stiff bristles ideal for use as a scrubbing brush, floor scrubbing brush, carpet scrubbing brush, tile cleaning brush, patio scrubbing brush, and bathroom cleaning brush. Made from durable plastic with an ergonomic iron-style handle, these heavy-duty scrub brushes offer maximum grip and control for demanding cleaning tasks. Are the bristles stiff enough for heavy-duty scrubbing? Yes. These brushes use extra-stiff bristles, making them perfect as a scrubbing brush heavy duty, floor scrubbing brush, tile brush, and patio scrubbing brush. They easily remove grime, stains, and dirt. Can I use these brushes for carpets? Absolutely. They are ideal as a carpet scrubbing brush, carpet cleaning brush, or carpet cleaner brush, helping lift deep stains and dirt from fibres. Are these good for bathroom and tile cleaning? Yes. They work excellently as a bathroom scrubber, bathroom cleaning brush, and tile cleaning brush, removing soap scum, mould, and grime from tiles, grout, and sinks. What surfaces can this scrubbing brush clean? These brushes are suitable for carpets, tiles, floors, skirting boards, bathrooms, and kitchens. They function as a floor brush, tile brush, scrub brush, and bathroom brush. Does the pack include three individual scrubbing brushes? Yes. You get 3 heavy-duty scrubbing brushes, ideal for using one in the bathroom, one for floors, and one as a patio scrubbing brush or outdoor cleaning tool.
